text:
(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates to current federal administrative law judges that bear the words “U.S. A. L. Judge.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290, Sec 44(a)(4), eff. September 1, 2011.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.404 — Federal Administrative Law Judges

(a) The department shall issue specialty license plates to current federal administrative law judges that bear the words “U.S. A. L. Judge.”

(b) Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290, Sec 44(a)(4), eff. September 1, 2011.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 247(14), eff. January 1, 2012.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The department shall issue specialty license plates to current federal administrative law judges that bear the words “U.S. A. L. Judge.”

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Repealed by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1290, Sec 44(a)(4), eff. September 1, 2011.
